title: Jim Cramer says the market powered through a tough earnings week but 'that doesn't mean we're out of the woods yet'
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer reviews the market's resilience through a challenging earnings week and previews key factors to watch in the busy week ahead. Despite positive momentum, Cramer warns investors remain in uncertain territory.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer looks to the jam-packed earnings week ahead and explains what he's looking for.

zh.title: 吉姆·克拉默表示市场度过了艰难的财报周,但"这并不意味着我们已经度过难关了"
zh.summary: 消费者新闻与商业频道的吉姆·克拉默回顾了市场在挑战性财报周的韧性,并预览了即将到来的繁忙一周需要关注的关键因素。尽管势头积极,克拉默警告投资者仍处于不确定的领域。

title: GameStop is hungry for relevance. Is buying eBay the answer?
summary: GameStop is reportedly pursuing an acquisition of eBay to regain relevance as both retailers struggle with changing consumer preferences. eBay has demonstrated superior adaptation to market shifts compared to GameStop.
content: GameStop is reportedly interesting in buying eBay, which has done a better job of adapting to changing consumer preferences.

zh.title: GameStop渴望重获市场关注。收购eBay是答案吗？
zh.summary: GameStop据报正在追求收购eBay以重获相关性，因为两家零售商都在与不断变化的消费者偏好作斗争。与GameStop相比，eBay在适应市场变化方面表现出更优越的能力。

title: Berkshire Hathaway’s shopping extravaganza draws lighter crowds as spotlight shifts to Greg Abel
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's annual shareholder event drew lighter crowds this year with attention focused on new CEO Greg Abel, who made efforts to engage directly with employees and shareholders. His visible presence marks the company's significant leadership transition.
content: Greg Abel made a point of stopping by every booth in the hall, greeting employees and shaking hands with shareholders.

zh.title: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦购物盛事吸引人数减少，聚光灯转向格雷格·阿贝尔
zh.summary: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦今年的年度股东大会吸引的观众减少，新任首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔成为关注焦点，他努力与员工和股东进行直接沟通。他的显著出现标志着公司重大的领导层过渡。

title: Social Security screwed up — and it cost widows and widowers over $50 million
summary: Social Security Administration errors have cost thousands of widows and widowers over $50 million in missing benefit payments. The widespread administrative blunders highlight systemic failures in payment accuracy and beneficiary protection.
content: Thousands have been short-changed of their Social Security payments as a result of blunders by the Social Security Administration

zh.title: 社会保障出错——造成寡妇和鳏夫损失超5000万美元
zh.summary: 社会保障局的错误造成数千名寡妇和鳏夫损失超过5000万美元的福利金。这些广泛的行政失误突显了支付准确性和受益人保护方面的系统性失败。

title: Trump says he's raising EU auto tariffs to 25%
summary: President Trump announces 25% tariffs on EU automobiles, escalating trade tensions after the Supreme Court struck down his reciprocal tariff framework. Europe has warned the measure could jeopardize its trade agreement with Washington.
content: The Supreme Court struck down Trump's "reciprocal" tariffs earlier this year, and Europe warned that its trade deal with Washington could be in jeopardy.

zh.title: Trump表示将把欧盟汽车关税提高到25%
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布对欧盟汽车征收25%的关税，在最高法院推翻其互惠关税框架后，贸易紧张局势进一步升级。欧洲警告称这一措施可能危害其与华盛顿的贸易协议。

title: Trump talks up his push to lower costs, as analysts see bruising midterms for GOP due to economic worries
summary: President Trump emphasized cost-reduction measures and tax cuts in a major economic speech while analysts predict significant GOP losses in November's midterms driven by voter affordability concerns. The remarks underscore a growing disconnect between administration messaging and economic anxiety.
content: President Donald Trump on Friday delivered a wide-ranging speech that focused in part on his efforts to lower taxes and other costs, as analysts predict defeats for his party in November’s midterm elections due to voters’ affordability concerns.

zh.title: 特朗普宣传降低成本举措，分析师预计共和党因经济担忧在中期选举中遭受重创
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在一次重大经济演讲中强调了降低成本措施和减税政策，同时分析师预测由于选民的负担能力担忧，共和党在11月的中期选举中将遭受重大损失。这些言论凸显了政府信息传递与经济焦虑之间日益增长的脱节。

title: Cautious optimism: Berkshire investors weigh future under new CEO Greg Abel
summary: Berkshire Hathaway shareholders expressed cautious optimism at the annual gathering as they assessed the company's direction under new CEO Greg Abel. The measured sentiment reflects confidence tempered by the magnitude of the leadership transition.
content: The mood in the air was cautiously optimistic as new and returning investors weighed the company's direction under a new chief executive.

zh.title: 谨慎乐观：伯克希尔投资者评估新CEO格雷格·阿贝尔领导下的未来
zh.summary: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司股东在年度大会上表达了谨慎乐观的态度，同时评估了在新任CEO格雷格·阿贝尔领导下公司的未来方向。这种克制的情绪反映了由于领导力转变规模之大而受到缓和的信心。

title: Mortgages, jobs and energy bills - how the Iran war will affect your money
summary: The Bank of England's latest analysis reveals how the Iran war directly impacts British households through effects on mortgages, employment, and energy bills. The report details the geopolitical conflict's cascading consequences for consumer finances.
content: The Bank of England's latest report reveals some interesting details on how our finances will be affected due to the Iran war.

zh.title: 抵押贷款、工作和能源账单——伊朗战争如何影响你的金钱
zh.summary: 英格兰银行的最新分析显示伊朗战争如何直接影响英国家庭，包括抵押贷款、就业和能源账单等方面。该报告详细说明了地缘政治冲突对消费者财务的连锁后果。

title: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
summary: The U.S. military has signed eight new contracts with major technology firms to expand artificial intelligence capabilities as part of becoming an 'AI-first' fighting force. The expansion reflects strategic modernization in military defense operations.
content: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.

zh.title: 五角大楼称美军将成为"人工智能优先"的作战力量
zh.summary: 美军与主要科技公司签署了八份新合同，以扩展人工智能能力，作为成为"人工智能优先"作战力量的一部分。这一扩展反映了军事防御行动中的战略现代化。

title: Trump tells Congress hostilities in Iran 'have terminated' as war powers deadline hits
summary: President Trump told Congress that Iran hostilities 'have terminated' as war powers deadline requirements approached, citing internal discord among Iranian leadership. Trump suggested the geopolitical tensions are de-escalating despite ongoing complexity.
content: Trump said there "is tremendous discord" among Iran's leaders, which has complicated efforts to end the war that the United States began in late February.

zh.title: 特朗普告诉国会伊朗敌对行动"已终止"，战争权限截止日期逼近
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在战争权限截止日期要求即将到来之际告诉国会伊朗敌对行动"已终止"，援引伊朗领导层内部不和为理由。特朗普表示尽管存在持续的复杂性，地缘政治紧张局势正在降级。

title: It now costs $160 to fill up America’s top-selling vehicle as the Iran war nears its 10th week
summary: Gasoline prices have surged nearly 50% since the Iran war began in late February, reaching $4.42 per gallon with fill-ups for America's best-selling vehicles now costing $160. The spike reflects energy market volatility tied to geopolitical conflict.
content: Regular unleaded gas is up almost 50% since the start of the Iran war, to $4.42 a gallon late Friday morning, according to GasBuddy.

zh.title: 随着伊朗战争接近第10周，美国畅销车型加满油现需160美元
zh.summary: 自伊朗战争在2月下旬开始以来，汽油价格飙升近50%，达到每加仑4.42美元，美国畅销车型的加油成本现已达到160美元。这种涨幅反映了与地缘政治冲突相关的能源市场波动。

title: Apple's stock gains as company execs cite iPhone, Mac demand in boosting guidance
summary: Apple's stock gained following the company's earnings announcement of revenue growth guidance of 14-17%, far exceeding analyst expectations. Strong iPhone and Mac demand drove the company's optimistic outlook.
content: On its quarterly earnings call, Apple said revenue growth in the current quarter would be between 14% and 17%, well above analysts' estimates.

zh.title: 苹果公司高管引用iPhone和Mac需求推升指导意见，股价上涨
zh.summary: 苹果公司公布收入增长指导意见为14-17%，远超分析师预期，随之股价上涨。强劲的iPhone和Mac需求推动了公司的乐观前景。

title: Jobs and earnings will dominate the first full week of May. Here's what's ahead
summary: The first full week of May will feature major jobs reports and corporate earnings announcements, with employment data potentially easing recession concerns. These key economic indicators will significantly influence market sentiment and investor confidence.
content: A solid jobs report could alleviate fears of a weakening U.S. economy, which some recent signals have indicated.

zh.title: 就业和收益将主导5月的第一个完整周。以下是前景预期
zh.summary: 5月的第一个完整周将呈现重大就业报告和公司收益公告，就业数据可能会缓解衰退担忧。这些关键经济指标将显著影响市场情绪和投资者信心。

title: Trump says government gave 'final' bailout proposal for Spirit Airlines as liquidation looms
summary: The government has presented what it calls a "final" bailout proposal to Spirit Airlines as the carrier faces potential liquidation. However, negotiations with bondholders have yet to produce an agreement this week, leaving the airline's fate uncertain.
content: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week have not yet yielded a deal.

zh.title: 特朗普称政府提出对精神航空公司的"最终"救助提案，公司面临清算威胁
zh.summary: 政府向面临潜在清算的精神航空公司提出了一份自称为"最终"的救助提案。然而，与债券持有人的谈判本周尚未达成协议，使得该航空公司的前景仍不确定。

title: S&P 500 rises to record to kick off May trading as oil falls, Apple shares jump: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 reached a record high as May trading began, driven by falling oil prices and strong Apple performance. April delivered the best monthly gains for both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq since 2020, signaling continued market momentum.
content: April marked the best monthly performance since 2020 for both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite.

zh.title: 标普500指数创新高启动5月交易，油价下跌，苹果股价上涨：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500指数在5月交易开始时创下历史新高，受油价下跌和苹果公司强劲表现推动。4月份为标普500指数和纳斯达克指数自2020年以来的最佳月度涨幅，表明市场势头持续。

title: Pirro keeps pressure on Fed's Powell despite dropping probe
summary: U.S. attorney Pirro continues to pursue scrutiny of Federal Reserve Chair Powell despite a court ruling that blocked her investigation into the Fed's cost overruns. She is expected to appeal the decision that halted her probe.
content: The U.S. attorney is expected to imminently appeal a ruling blocking her investigation of the Fed's cost overruns.

zh.title: 皮罗在放弃调查后继续对美联储主席鲍威尔施压
zh.summary: 美国律师皮罗在法院裁决阻止其对美联储成本超支的调查后，继续对美联储主席鲍威尔进行审查。她预计将对暂停其调查的裁决提出上诉。

title: Six months out, control of the Senate is a dead heat, traders on Kalshi say
summary: With six months until elections, prediction market traders on Kalshi view Senate control as an even race between parties. While Democrats are favored to gain House control, Senate control remains highly competitive according to market odds.
content: While Democrats are favored to flip control of the House of Representatives, the upper chamber is a much closer race, traders believe.

zh.title: 距离选举六个月，Kalshi交易员表示参议院控制权是势均力敌的局面
zh.summary: 距离选举六个月，Kalshi预测市场交易员认为参议院控制权在两党之间势均力敌。虽然民主党被看好能赢得众议院控制权，但根据市场赔率，参议院控制权仍然极具竞争力。

title: If Spirit ends up shutting down, these airlines stand to benefit
summary: If Spirit Airlines shuts down, competitors would gain access to valuable airport slots, gates, and routes previously held by the carrier. This consolidation could create expansion opportunities for other airlines seeking to grow operations.
content: A shuttered airline would open up precious airport slots, gates and routes, and could create opportunities for other carriers to expand.

zh.title: 如果Spirit航空公司最终关闭，这些航空公司将受益
zh.summary: 如果Spirit航空公司关闭，竞争对手将获得该航空公司之前持有的宝贵机场时间槽、登机口和航线。这种行业整合可能为其他寻求扩大运营的航空公司创造扩展机会。

title: Wall Street is finding a new use for the latest retail-trading obsession
summary: Wall Street is developing new strategies to profit from the growing retail popularity of prediction markets. As more individual traders participate in these platforms, institutional players are finding ways to extract value from the trend.
content: As more people start using prediction markets, Wall Street is finding ways to derive value from them.

zh.title: 华尔街为最新的散户交易热潮找到了新用途
zh.summary: 华尔街正在开发新策略，以从预测市场日益增长的散户欢迎中获利。随着越来越多个人交易者参与这些平台，机构参与者正在找到从这一趋势中获取价值的方法。

title: New Fed chair Warsh will have a fight on his hands if he pushes for interest-rate cuts
summary: New Federal Reserve Chair Warsh may face significant pushback if he pursues interest-rate cuts, as recent statements from Fed officials indicate lingering inflation concerns. Key policymakers appear reluctant to pursue further rate reductions in the near term.
content: Statements from three officials show inflation fears are giving them cold feet about any more rate cuts.

zh.title: 新美联储主席沃什如果推动降息将面临困难
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席沃什如果追求降息可能会面临重大阻力，因为美联储官员最近的声明表明仍存在通胀担忧。关键决策者似乎不愿在近期推进进一步的降息。

title: Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
summary: Bitcoin experienced significant gains in April, but the rally may be fragile due to weak underlying buyer demand, according to blockchain analytics firm CryptoQuant. The lack of sustained buying pressure suggests the price surge could be at risk of reversal.
content: Bitcoin surged in April, but its run could be on shaky ground, according to CryptoQuant.

zh.title: 比特币四月份大幅上涨，但买盘疲软使涨势脆弱
zh.summary: 根据区块链分析公司CryptoQuant的数据，比特币在四月份经历了显著上涨，但由于缺乏强劲的买盘，这种涨势可能很脆弱。持续买盘压力不足表明价格上涨可能面临反转风险。

title: Exxon Mobil CEO expects higher oil prices due to Iran war: ‘The market hasn’t seen the full impact’
summary: Exxon Mobil's CEO predicts sustained higher oil prices resulting from regional tensions, stating the market has not yet fully priced in potential impacts. Oil markets have swung dramatically between escalation fears and peace hopes, reflecting uncertainty about the situation's trajectory.
content: Oil prices have soared on the risk of escalation and then plunged on hopes for peace before repeating the cycle.

zh.title: 埃克森美孚CEO预计伊朗战争将导致油价上涨：'市场还未看到全面影响'
zh.summary: 埃克森美孚CEO预测，由于地区紧张局势，油价将长期保持高位，并表示市场尚未充分反映潜在影响。石油市场在升级恐惧和和平希望之间剧烈波动，反映了对局势发展方向的不确定性。

title: Roblox had a child-safety problem. Now it has a revenue problem.
summary: Roblox has reduced its annual revenue guidance as newly implemented age-verification safety measures have decreased user engagement. The company faces a tradeoff between protecting younger users and maintaining the platform's growth and profitability.
content: The gaming platform lowered its annual revenue projections, saying new age-verification programs have caused engagement to drop.

zh.title: Roblox曾面临儿童安全问题，如今又面临收入问题
zh.summary: 由于新实施的年龄验证安全措施降低了用户参与度，Roblox下调了年度收入指导。该公司面临保护年轻用户与维持平台增长和盈利能力之间的权衡。

title: Apple proves once again it is the ultimate cash machine. How to trade the stock from here
summary: Apple continues to distinguish itself among the "Magnificent Seven" mega-cap stocks by focusing on cash generation and shareholder returns rather than competing in the AI arms race. The company's consistent profitability makes it a unique investment case within the group.
content: While the rest of the 'Mag 7' is caught up in the artificial intelligence arms race, Apple remains the ultimate shareholder 'cash machine.'

zh.title: 苹果再次证明自己是终极现金制造机。投资者该如何从这里交易该股票
zh.summary: 苹果通过专注于现金生成和股东回报，而非参与人工智能军备竞赛，继续在"宏伟七家"超大型股中脱颖而出。该公司持续的盈利能力使其在该集团中成为独特的投资案例。

title: Roku is one of the big earnings winners of the day. Two major analysts see more to go
summary: Roku delivered strong earnings results and continues to attract analyst optimism for further gains. Analysts believe the company's focus on customer acquisition and advertising revenue growth positions it well to benefit from favorable industry trends.
content: Roku should continue to rally as it pushes to gain more customers and increase its advertising revenue while benefiting from industry tailwinds, analysts say.

zh.title: Roku是今日主要盈利赢家之一。两位主要分析师认为还有上升空间
zh.summary: Roku交付了强劲的盈利成果，并继续吸引分析师对进一步增长的乐观态度。分析师认为该公司专注于客户获取和广告收入增长，有利于从行业的有利趋势中获益。

title: Why you won't find Kentucky Derby bets on prediction platforms
summary: Major prediction market platforms Kalshi and Polymarket are not offering betting on the Kentucky Derby, which takes place this Saturday in Louisville. The decision reflects regulatory or operational constraints on certain wagering markets.
content: The Kentucky Derby takes place Saturday in Louisville. Prediction market platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket are sitting the race out.

zh.title: 为什么你在预测平台上找不到肯塔基德比投注
zh.summary: 主要预测市场平台Kalshi和Polymarket未提供肯塔基德比的投注，该赛事将于本周六在路易斯维尔举行。这一决定反映了对某些博彩市场的监管或运营约束。

title: Samsung is the latest tech player to bemoan memory chip crunch. That's good news for these stocks, analysts say
summary: Samsung has joined other tech players in highlighting memory chip supply constraints, a development that could benefit competing semiconductor manufacturers. High selling prices and supply tightness in AI infrastructure are benefiting certain companies in the supply chain.
content: Selling prices are causing "nosebleeds" in the middle of the artificial intelligence supply chain.

zh.title: 三星加入芯片短缺抱怨行列，分析师称这对这些股票利好
zh.summary: 三星加入其他科技公司突出内存芯片供应约束的行列，这一进展可能使竞争的半导体制造商受益。人工智能基础设施中的高售价和供应紧张正在惠及供应链中的某些公司。

title: The Real Greek rescued by Cote Brasserie-owner
summary: The Real Greek restaurant chain has been largely rescued through a takeover by the Karali group, which owns Cote Brasserie. The deal preserves most of the Mediterranean chain's locations, with only nine of the 28 outlets remaining outside the acquisition.
content: All but nine of the Mediterranean chain's 28 outlets are being taken over by the family-owned Karali group.

zh.title: 真希腊被Cote Brasserie老板救助
zh.summary: 真希腊连锁餐厅已基本通过被拥有Cote Brasserie的Karali集团收购而获救。该交易保留了这一地中海连锁店的大部分门店，仅有28家门店中的9家未纳入收购范围。

title: Japan risks Trump’s ire as Iran war fallout sparks currency intervention
summary: Japan is intervening in currency markets as the yen surges amid Middle East tensions and potential Trump trade policies. Currency strategists warn that intervention alone won't solve Japan's underlying economic challenges. This matters because Japan's currency strength could impact its export competitiveness during a volatile geopolitical period.
content: “FX intervention will only get them so far,” one strategist said after the yen surged.

zh.title: 日本冒着惹怒特朗普的风险，伊朗战争后果引发货币干预
zh.summary: 日本正在干预货币市场，因为在中东紧张局势和特朗普贸易政策不确定背景下，日元上升。货币策略师警告称，仅靠干预无法解决日本根本的经济挑战。这很重要，因为在地缘政治局势动荡的时期，日元升值可能会影响日本的出口竞争力。

title: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
summary: Some Federal Reserve officials dissented on the post-meeting statement, opposing language that hints the next interest rate move will be a cut. These dissenters believe such signaling is premature or inappropriate given current economic conditions. This is significant because it shows division within the Fed about future monetary policy direction.
content: Federal Reserve officials who voted this week against the post-meeting statement said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.

zh.title: 美联储反对者解释反对票，称他们反对暗示下一步行动将是降息
zh.summary: 一些美联储官员在会议后声明中提出异议，反对暗示下一步利率行动将是降息的措辞。这些反对者认为在目前的经济状况下，这样的信号过于仓促或不适当。这很重要，因为它显示了美联储内部对未来货币政策方向的分歧。

title: 'I earn £36k but I can't afford to buy a house'
summary: In Wales, people earning £36,000 struggle to afford home ownership, with private rental costs also unaffordable for most residents. Housing advocacy group Shelter Cymru reports widespread affordability challenges across the nation. This reflects the broader housing crisis affecting many regions in the UK.
content: Shelter Cymru says privately rented homes are unaffordable for most people across Wales.

zh.title: 我年收入36000英镑，但我买不起房子
zh.summary: 在威尔士，年收入36000英镑的人难以承担房屋所有权成本，私人租赁费用对大多数居民来说也无法承受。住房倡导组织Shelter Cymru报告称全国存在广泛的住房可负担性危机。这反映了影响英国许多地区的更广泛的住房危机。

title: Pentagon tech chief says Anthropic is still blacklisted, but Mythos is a separate issue
summary: The Pentagon's technology chief has clarified that while Anthropic remains blacklisted from government contracts, the company's Mythos project is being treated as a separate matter. This distinction may allow for continued discussion about specific initiatives despite broader policy restrictions. The statement reflects the ongoing complexity of AI company relationships with U.S. government defense agencies.

zh.title: 五角大楼科技主管称Anthropic仍被列入黑名单，但Mythos是另一回事
zh.summary: 五角大楼的技术主管澄清，虽然Anthropic仍被列入政府合同黑名单，但该公司的Mythos项目被视为单独事项。这种区分可能允许尽管存在更广泛的政策限制，仍对特定举措进行持续讨论。该声明反映了AI公司与美国政府国防机构关系的持续复杂性。

title: Health savings accounts can be a record-keeping nightmare. Here's why
summary: Health savings accounts (HSAs) allow consumers to reimburse themselves for past medical expenses, but require maintaining receipts to avoid IRS penalties. Poor record-keeping practices can become costly and complicated during audits. This matters for HSA users who may not realize the documentation burden could lead to significant penalties.
content: Consumers with health savings accounts can reimburse themselves years later for medical bills. But they have to keep the receipts — or risk IRS penalties.

zh.title: 健康储蓄账户可能成为记录保管的噩梦。原因如下
zh.summary: 健康储蓄账户（HSA）允许消费者为过去的医疗费用自我报销，但需要保存收据以避免美国国税局的处罚。记录保管不当可能在审计期间变得昂贵和复杂。这对可能不知道文件保管负担可能导致重大罚款的HSA用户很重要。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Apple, Estee Lauder, Roku, Reddit, Roblox and more
summary: Several major stocks including Apple, Estee Lauder, Roku, Reddit, and Roblox are experiencing significant price movements in premarket trading. These early-session moves often signal broader market sentiment ahead of regular trading hours. Investors watch premarket activity to gauge potential trading opportunities and market direction.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前交易中波动最大的股票：苹果、雅诗兰黛、Roku、Reddit、Roblox等
zh.summary: 包括苹果、雅诗兰黛、Roku、Reddit和Roblox在内的几只主要股票在盘前交易中经历显著的价格波动。这些早盘交易活动通常预示着常规交易时段前的更广泛市场情绪。投资者关注盘前活动以评估潜在的交易机会和市场方向。

title: Estee Lauder plans to cut up to 3,000 more jobs, lifts annual profit forecast
summary: Estee Lauder announced plans to eliminate up to 3,000 positions while simultaneously raising its annual profit forecast, signaling aggressive cost-cutting measures. The restructuring accelerates the company's existing transformation efforts in response to market conditions. This reflects a broader corporate trend of workforce reductions paired with margin improvements.
content: Estee ​Lauder on Friday ​raised its annual profit forecast and laid out plans to cut up to 3,000 more jobs as it accelerates a broad restructuring plan.

zh.title: 雅诗兰黛计划裁员3000人,提高年度利润预期
zh.summary: 雅诗兰黛宣布计划消除高达3000个职位,同时提高其年度利润预期,这表明了激进的成本削减措施。这次重组加速了公司现有的转型工作以应对市场状况。这反映了更广泛的企业趋势——员工数量减少与利润率改善相结合。

title: Elon Musk billionaires bill supporters draw progressive challengers in Delaware
summary: Elon Musk's record Tesla pay package faced legal challenges in Delaware, prompting him to relocate the company's incorporation out of state. Progressive activists are now fielding challengers to Delaware politicians who support billionaire-friendly policies. This reflects tensions between corporate interests and progressive politics in the state known as a corporate haven.
content: Musk, whose record pay package was in legal limbo in Delaware, relocated Tesla's incorporation out of state during the spat.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克亿万富翁法案支持者在特拉华州面临进步派挑战
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克创纪录的特斯拉薪酬方案在特拉华州面临法律诉讼,促使他将公司的注册地迁出州外。进步派活动人士现在正在提名候选人挑战支持亿万富翁友好政策的特拉华州政治家。这反映了公司利益与进步派政治之间的紧张关系,而该州以企业天堂而闻名。

title: New homeowners pay 3 times more property tax than their neighbors in some places. Here’s what they can do about it.
summary: New homeowners in some areas face property tax bills three times higher than long-time neighbors, a phenomenon known as the "newcomer tax" spreading across regions. This disparity occurs because property tax rates are often based on assessed values when properties change hands. The practice particularly disadvantages first-time homebuyers and those entering new markets.
content: The “newcomer tax” is steep — and spreading.

zh.title: 新房主在某些地方支付的房产税是邻居的三倍。以下是他们可以采取的措施。
zh.summary: 在某些地区,新房主面临的房产税账单是长期居民的三倍,这种现象被称为"新人税",正在各地蔓延。这种差异出现是因为房产税税率通常基于房产转手时的估计价值。这种做法特别不利于首次购房者和进入新市场的人。

title: How the Iran war affects your money and bills
summary: Military conflict in Iran is raising costs across multiple consumer categories including gasoline, household energy, and food prices. Global supply chain disruptions and energy market volatility stemming from Middle East instability directly impact household budgets. This illustrates how geopolitical events quickly translate into financial pressure on everyday consumers.
content: The conflict in the Middle East has increased pressure on the cost of petrol, household energy bills and even food.

zh.title: 伊朗战争如何影响你的金钱和账单
zh.summary: 伊朗军事冲突正在推高汽油、家庭能源和食品价格等多个消费类别的成本。中东地区不稳定引发的全球供应链中断和能源市场波动直接影响家庭预算。这说明地缘政治事件如何迅速转化为对日常消费者的财务压力。

title: No evidence of widespread fuel price-gouging, watchdog says
summary: The UK's competition watchdog found no evidence of widespread fuel price-gouging, with profit margins remaining stable between February and March. Despite rising fuel costs, retailers' profit margins have not increased unexpectedly. This finding challenges concerns that fuel retailers are capitalizing on market volatility through price manipulation.
content: Profit margins were "broadly unchanged" between February and March, the UK's competition watchdog says.

zh.title: 监管机构表示未发现广泛的燃料价格虚高现象
zh.summary: 英国竞争监管机构未发现广泛的燃料价格虚高现象，2月至3月期间零售商利润率保持稳定。尽管燃料成本上升，零售商的利润率并未出现意外增加。这一发现对燃料零售商通过价格操纵从市场波动中获利的担忧提出了质疑。

title: Here's what major analysts are saying about Apple's earnings
summary: Major analysts are optimistic about Apple's earnings performance, noting that the company has successfully navigated challenges like rising memory costs. Investors expect Apple to continue gaining market share based on the company's demonstrated resilience. The positive analyst sentiment suggests Apple is well-positioned for continued growth despite economic headwinds.
content: Apple is expected to gain more ground after its earnings report showed the iPhone maker has largely weathered headwinds like rising memory costs, analysts said.

zh.title: 主要分析师对苹果财季业绩的看法
zh.summary: 主要分析师对苹果的财季业绩持乐观态度，指出该公司成功应对了内存成本上升等挑战。投资者预计苹果将继续根据公司展现的韧性扩大市场份额。分析师的积极态度表明，尽管面临经济逆风，苹果仍处于良好位置以继续增长。

title: 3 questions to ask before raiding your 401(k) for a hardship withdrawal
summary: Financial coaches outline key questions to help people evaluate whether withdrawing from their 401(k) for hardship is a sound financial decision or an emotional one. The process requires distinguishing between necessary emergency funds and impulse financial decisions. This guidance helps individuals overcome the psychological barriers to making rational retirement fund decisions.
content: Money coaches tell you how to move past the stigma and decide if tapping your retirement fund is rational or reactive.

zh.title: 在申请401(k)困难提取前应该问的3个问题
zh.summary: 财务顾问列举了关键问题，帮助人们评估从401(k)中因困难提取资金是否是明智的财务决定还是情感性决定。该过程需要区分必要的应急资金和冲动的财务决定。这些指导帮助个人克服心理障碍，做出理性的退休基金决定。

title: How will car finance compensation payments work?
summary: Millions of British car buyers may be eligible for compensation due to problematic commission arrangements between auto lenders and dealers. The compensation mechanism addresses past lending practices that may have unfairly benefited dealers at consumers' expense. This regulatory action aims to remedy years of potentially exploitative financing arrangements in the auto industry.
content: Millions could be entitled to compensation as a result of commission arrangements between lenders and dealers.

zh.title: 汽车融资赔偿金将如何支付？
zh.summary: 数百万英国汽车购买者因汽车贷款机构和经销商之间存在的问题佣金安排，可能有资格获得赔偿。赔偿机制旨在解决过去可能不公平地使经销商受益而损害消费者利益的贷款实践。这一监管行动旨在纠正汽车行业多年来潜在的剥削性融资安排。

title: Software stocks are finally priced for a comeback, this veteran strategist says. He’s buying.
summary: Veteran strategist Tom Lee believes software stocks are undervalued and positioned for a comeback as companies adapt to AI opportunities. Lee argues investors are underestimating the strength of established software firms facing AI disruption. This perspective suggests long-term value in software sector stocks amid the ongoing AI revolution.
content: Fundstrat managing partner and head of research Tom Lee says investors are underestimating how strong software companies will rise to the AI challenge.

zh.title: 软件股票终于出现反弹机会，资深策略师表示。他在买入。
zh.summary: 资深策略师汤姆·李认为，随着公司适应人工智能机遇，软件股票被严重低估，并准备迎来反弹。李主张投资者低估了面对人工智能颠覆的老牌软件公司的实力。这一观点表明，在正在进行的人工智能革命中，软件板块股票具有长期投资价值。

title: South East Water chair resigns after critical report
summary: The chair of South East Water has resigned following a critical report and a vote of no confidence from MPs regarding the company's leadership. This development signals accountability issues at the water utility amid broader scrutiny of utility company management.
content: It comes after a group of MPs declared that they had no confidence in the company's leadership.

zh.title: 东南水务主席因批评报告辞职
zh.summary: 东南水务主席在一份严厉批评的报告和议员的不信任投票之后宣布辞职。这一事件反映出该水务公司存在问责机制问题，同时体现了公众对公用事业公司管理的广泛关注。

title: Tourists feel petrol pinch and cut down on day trips
summary: Rising fuel costs are dampening tourism in western regions, with attractions experiencing declining visitor numbers as households prioritize essential expenses. This trend reflects broader consumer pressure from cost-of-living challenges affecting leisure spending.
content: Tourist attractions in the West report falling numbers as people spend more on essentials.

zh.title: 游客因油价上升减少日间旅游
zh.summary: 不断上升的燃料成本正在抑制西部地区的旅游业，由于家庭优先安排必要开支，各景点的游客数量明显下降。这一趋势反映了生活成本上升对消费者的更广泛压力，正在压缩休闲娱乐支出。

title: China’s EV price war turns into AI arms race beyond cheaper cars
summary: Chinese EV manufacturers are now competing on AI-powered in-car features rather than price alone, but rapid commoditization of these technologies suggests the competitive advantage is temporary. This shift highlights how price wars are pushing manufacturers upstream to differentiation strategies.
content: Chinese EV firms are rapidly rolling out in-car AI features to gain an edge, but as the price war drags on, those technologies are quickly becoming commoditized.

zh.title: 中国电动汽车价格战演变为AI军备竞赛
zh.summary: 中国电动汽车制造商现在主要通过AI驱动的车载功能进行竞争，而不是单纯的价格竞争。但这些技术的快速商品化表明竞争优势难以维持。这一转变表明价格战正在推动制造商向差异化战略发展。

title: The S&P 500’s newest member is this under-the-radar software stock
summary: Veeva Systems, a cloud software company, is joining the S&P 500 index, driving significant stock gains. Index inclusion typically signals a company's maturation and can attract passive investment flows.
content: Veeva Systems’ stock is soaring upon news that it will soon join the benchmark index.

zh.title: 标普500指数的最新成员是这家不为人知的软件股票
zh.summary: 云软件公司Veeva Systems正加入标普500指数，推动股票大幅上涨。指数纳入通常标志着公司的成熟，并能吸引被动投资流入。

title: Oil rises as White House says Iran ceasefire halts 60-day war deadline
summary: Oil prices increased on news that an Iran ceasefire would pause the 60-day deadline under the War Powers Resolution for U.S. troop withdrawal. Reduced geopolitical tension typically supports energy prices by easing concerns over Middle East supply disruptions.
content: Under the 1973 War Powers Resolution, a U.S. president needs to withdraw troops 60 days after reporting their deployment to Congress

zh.title: 白宫称伊朗停火暂停60天战争期限，油价上涨
zh.summary: 关于伊朗停火将暂停《战争权力决议案》下的60天期限之消息推高油价。地缘政治紧张局势减少通常通过缓解对中东供应中断的担忧来支撑能源价格。

title: You don't have to wait for the TrumpIRA to start saving for retirement. Use these 3 tools to start saving now
summary: Americans can access several existing tools—IRAs, annuities, and mortgage refinancing—to boost retirement savings without waiting for new policy changes. The article highlights that current options already provide meaningful pathways for retirement planning.
content: How IRAs, annuities and mortgage refinancing can help you build retirement savings right now.

zh.title: 你不必等待TrumpIRA开始退休储蓄。使用这3个工具现在就开始储蓄
zh.summary: 美国人可以使用多种现有工具（IRA、年金和抵押贷款再融资）增加退休储蓄，无需等待新政策变化。该文章强调，当前的选择已经为退休规划提供了有意义的途径。

title: China’s self-driving truck leaders say AI breakthroughs won’t accelerate rollout — here’s why
summary: Despite recent AI breakthroughs in software and language models, Chinese autonomous truck companies say deployment timelines remain unchanged due to non-AI bottlenecks. This reflects the gap between AI research progress and real-world vehicle commercialization challenges.
content: Rapid advances in AI for coding and chatbots doesn't change the timeline for getting self-driving vehicles on the road, industry executives in China said.

zh.title: 中国自动驾驶卡车领导者称人工智能突破不会加快推出进度——原因如下
zh.summary: 尽管软件和语言模型方面取得了最近的人工智能突破，但中国自动驾驶卡车公司表示，由于非人工智能瓶颈，部署时间表保持不变。这反映了人工智能研究进展与现实世界车辆商业化挑战之间的差距。

title: Japan Airlines begins humanoid robot trials at Tokyo's Haneda airport as labor shortages bite
summary: Japan Airlines is conducting trials of humanoid robots at Tokyo's Haneda Airport to address chronic labor shortages and an aging workforce. The move reflects Japan's broader push to automate services as demographic challenges persist. This pilot could signal a shift toward automation in airport ground operations.
content: Tokyo's Haneda Airport is beginning a trial of humanoid robots in airport ground services amid chronic labor challenges and a rapidly ageing workforce.

zh.title: 日本航空在东京羽田机场启动人形机器人试运营以应对劳动力短缺
zh.summary: 日本航空正在东京羽田机场进行人形机器人试运营，以应对慢性劳动力短缺和人口老龄化问题。此举反映了日本在应对人口结构挑战中推进服务自动化的更广泛努力。这项试点可能预示着机场地面运营走向自动化的转变。

title: Australia and Japan markets climb, looking past Iran war escalation fears
summary: Asian markets in Australia and Japan posted gains as investors focused on strong U.S. earnings rather than geopolitical tensions in Iran. The rally suggests market confidence despite weaker-than-expected economic data stateside. Investors are prioritizing corporate performance over escalation risks.
content: This comes as investors took in strong earnings stateside, looking past weaker-than-expected economic data and threats of escalation in Iran.

zh.title: 澳大利亚和日本股市上扬，投资者淡化伊朗战争升级忧虑
zh.summary: 澳大利亚和日本的亚洲股市上扬，因投资者关注强劲的美国财报而非伊朗地缘政治紧张局势。尽管美国经济数据不及预期，但股市上涨表明投资者信心依然充足。投资者优先考虑企业业绩而非升级风险。

title: Video shows Trump attack suspect Cole Allen casing Hilton, storming checkpoint: Pirro
summary: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro disclosed surveillance footage showing Trump attack suspect Cole Allen conducting reconnaissance at a Hilton and breaching security checkpoints. Pirro stated there is no evidence a Secret Service gunshot during the incident resulted from friendly fire. The disclosure provides new details about the alleged attacker's pre-incident actions.
content: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said there is no evidence that a Secret Service shot during the incident was the victim of friendly fire.

zh.title: 视频显示特朗普袭击嫌疑人科尔·艾伦在希尔顿酒店探查并突破检查站：皮罗
zh.summary: 美国检察官詹妮尼·皮罗公开监控视频，显示特朗普袭击嫌疑人科尔·艾伦在希尔顿酒店进行侦察并突破安全检查站。皮罗表示没有证据表明事件中特勤局枪声来自友军误伤。该披露提供了关于涉嫌袭击者事前行动的新细节。

title: The memory trade is faltering as Western Digital’s stock slides in the face of earnings beat
summary: Western Digital's stock declined despite reporting better-than-expected earnings, reflecting investor skepticism about the semiconductor memory sector. The weakness comes after a strong one-year rally in memory stocks, suggesting profit-taking may be underway. The divergence between earnings and stock performance highlights shifting market sentiment.
content: Investors are panning upbeat results from Western Digital and Sandisk after massive one-year stock rallies.

zh.title: 西部数据股价在业绩超预期的冲击下下滑,存储芯片贸易陷入困境
zh.summary: 尽管西部数据报告了超预期的收益,但其股票仍然下跌,反映出投资者对半导体存储芯片行业的怀疑态度。这种疲软出现在存储芯片股票强劲上涨一年之后,表明获利回吐可能正在进行。收益与股价表现的分歧突出了市场情绪的转变。

title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in May 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
summary: Major streaming platforms are releasing notable content in May 2026, including Netflix's "Lord of the Flies" and Apple's "Star City," along with returning shows like Hulu's "Deli Boys." The month offers a diverse slate across multiple subscription services. Content is available across Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max, and Apple platforms.
content: Netflix’s ‘Lord of the Flies,’ Apple’s ‘Star City’ and the return of Hulu’s ‘Deli Boys’ are among the highlights of the coming month

zh.title: 2026年5月Netflix、Hulu、HBO Max等平台值得观看的内容推荐
zh.summary: 主要流媒体平台在2026年5月推出值得关注的内容,包括Netflix的《蛀虫》和Apple的《星城》,以及Hulu回归的《熟食男孩》等剧集。本月在多个订阅服务中提供多样化的内容。Netflix、Hulu、HBO Max和Apple等平台都有相关内容。

title: Chippies sell catfish as 'traditional fish supper'
summary: A BBC investigation uncovered chip shop operators selling cheaper catfish species while marketing them as traditional fish and chips. The practice represents a form of food fraud that misleads consumers about what they're purchasing. The findings raise questions about labeling standards and consumer protection in the food sector.
content: A BBC investigation finds chip shop owners passing off cheaper species as "traditional fish and chips".

zh.title: 炸鱼薯条店将鲶鱼冒充"传统炸鱼"出售
zh.summary: BBC调查发现炸鱼薯条店经营者在销售廉价鲶鱼时将其冒充为传统炸鱼薯条。这种做法构成食品欺诈,误导消费者关于他们购买的商品。调查结果引发了对食品行业标签标准和消费者保护的质疑。

title: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
summary: China has eliminated tariffs for nearly all African countries, a move that enhances China's soft power and diplomatic influence on the continent. The zero-tariff regime could benefit African exporters but may create uneven advantages across nations, analysts note. The policy underscores China's strategic trade engagement in Africa.
content: The zero-tariff regime gives China's soft power a boost, but may lead to uneven gains, say analysts.

zh.title: 中国对除一个外的所有非洲国家取消关税
zh.summary: 中国已消除了几乎所有非洲国家的关税，此举增强了中国在该大陆的软实力和外交影响力。零关税制度可能使非洲出口商受益，但也可能在各国之间造成不均匀的优势，分析人士指出。该政策体现了中国在非洲的战略贸易参与。
